page_metadata.biotools__summary: Provides functions for aligning 2D gas chromatography mass spectrometry derived metabolite peaks obtained from primary processing and generates an alignment table that allows for a comparison of common peaks across samples and metabolite identification.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Provides functions for aligning 2D gas chromatography mass spectrometry derived metabolite peaks obtained from primary processing and generates an alignment table that allows for a comparison of common peaks across samples and metabolite identification.
